How it works

Three steps from a fuzzy idea to a booked-in tattoo you're excited about.

STEP 1

Upload the design you want tattooed

Add your design, tap where it goes and your size. Takes 90 seconds, and it’s free.

STEP 2

Artists respond with quotes

Matched local artists reply with a price. No chasing ten studios yourself.

STEP 3

Review artists and choose

Compare portfolios, reviews and reply rates, then book who’s right for you.

Why Quote My Tattoo is the reliable way

Big or small, upload the tattoo you want and get matched with verified UK artists who can bring it to life.

Excellent Trustpilot
More info about our checks here

Get matched with available artists

Upload your design for free and receive quotes from local artists who are keen to take it on.

Choose who you want to connect with

Read reviews, view full portfolios and browse healed work before you decide who to message, so you can make an informed choice.

Book with confidence

Every artist is checked when they join, covering council licensing, ID, studio hygiene and insurance, so you can book knowing you're in safe hands.

Guides

Know what to look for before, during and after your tattoo. Browse all guides

Safety & standards

Is your tattoo artist licensed?

Every UK studio must be registered with its local council. Here's how to check your artist is licensed, insured and following the right hygiene standards before you book.

Read more
4 min read
Before you book

What is a consent form?

Before any tattoo you'll sign a consent form and a short medical questionnaire. Here's what they cover, why they matter, and what a good studio will always ask you.

Read more
3 min read
Aftercare

How long does a tattoo take to heal?

A fresh tattoo looks healed long before it actually is. We walk through the surface and deeper healing stages, typical timelines, and how to care for it at each step.

Read more
5 min read

quotemytattoo.co.uk Save & exit

Step 1 of 3

Show us the tattoo you want

Upload a design, a reference, or anything that captures the idea. Add as many as you like. The more the artists see, the more accurate your quotes.

Add a photo of your design or reference A sketch, screenshot, Pinterest save or photo, whatever you’ve got. (Tap to simulate)

Step 2 of 3

Where on your body?

Tap the spot. Don't worry about being exact. You can talk it through with the artist.

No spot chosen yet.
Tap anywhere on the figure to place your tattoo.

Step 3 of 3

How big, and where are you?

Roughly how big, and your area so we can match local artists. That’s everything. Your design tells them the rest.

Your quotes

Here's what to expect

Typical price for a piece like yours

£– – £–

3 artists who fit, and who reply

We only surface artists with a strong response rate, so your enquiry won't sit unread.

Sent to 3 artists 🎉

You'll get quotes in the app and by email. Each artist sees your design, placement and size, so no repeating yourself. You decide who to take forward, and pay nothing until you book.
